reviews.review_title: Excellent, but not as good as  Choppers
reviews.review_description:
Purchased this due  to price and the same developers made the excellent planes and choppers games. 

This game along with the other two are keepers for sure 

I really hope the developers make a similar game featuring tanks.

Has a cool feature adding water to your room. Good game if you are into remote controlled boats. 

You can get the submarine to dive and battleship to fire its guns in full scale. And other boats doing things too.

To be honest, this app is way better than I thought it would be. The different modes are truly amazing. My favorite is flying around the ship as it sells at sea at full scale. It’s truly a dream come true for somebody who really enjoys ships and the history behind them the ability to hold the Queen Mary in your hand and see such detail in the model is truly astonishing. This app is definitely worth buying if you have any interest in ships at all thank you to the Dev for making such a great experience. ￼

Another fun game from the creator of the mind blowing AR Planes (if you haven't got that, you missing out BIG time) loving that so I decided to get this one also. Nice visuals and will be great for boat and ship enthusiasts alike. Different scales, scenarios and the mermaids I have to say are my absolutely favorite touch, well that and simply go on lookout tower of the Pirate ship near the flag so you can hear it in the wind and simply chill there as the ocean rolls underneath.
This game is so fun i play it all the time you can sail ship in vr thats something new
